Politics.headline: 'I will never forget or forgive': Former MP blasts National as she changes parties
Politics.detail: Jackie Blue, a former MP, is leaving the National Party to join the Opportunity Party, citing disagreement with the government's treatment of low-paid workers.

Politics.headline: Māori advocates say 'mean-spirited' move-on orders will cause more harm
Politics.detail: Advocates are criticizing the use of move-on orders for addressing homelessness, arguing that they are harmful and simply displace the problem.

The victim reported the abuse to North Yorkshire Police in September 2023.
